title: Useful Materials
description: This mod adds tons of new tools, and armor to Minecraft 1.19.2, it even adds Ruby back into the game! This includes: Wood Armor, Leather Tools, Coal Tools/Armor, and tons more. It makes Lapis and Copper have new uses too!
body:
**Need a super high performance and easy Minecraft server at a good price? Try [godlike.host](https://godlike.host/?aff_id=1323) now!**
![GodLike.Host](https://godlike.host/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/godlike_logo_horizontal_join_ua_v1.png)

---

**Useful Materials gives nearly useless items and blocks in Minecraft a whole new purpose.**

This mod adds new tools and armor sets made from materials that normally sit untouched—like Copper, Lapis Lazuli, Redstone, Charcoal, Quartz, and even wood types. It also introduces a brand new rare ore: Ruby, which can be crafted into powerful gear.

## Tool Types Added:
This includes all the types (Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe)

Leather
Coal
Charcoal
Emerald
Copper
Lapis Lazuli
Redstone
Quartz
Ruby

## Armor Types Added:
Craft armor from:

Ruby, Emerald, Lapis Lazuli, Copper, Quartz, Redstone, Charcoal, Coal
All 9 wood types: Oak, Spruce, Birch, Jungle, Acacia, Dark Oak, Crimson, Warped, Mangrove
Perfect for survival players who want more crafting options, and for builders who love gear variety.

## All recipes are balanced for a natural, vanilla-friendly progression.
Have fun customizing your armor and having fun with these new types! Try the tools too!
